geography.data_source: MCGM ward boundaries (M/East, M/West wards mapped to numeric IDs); area from MCGM Development Plan 2034

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 M-ward Mumbai suburban district; density = population/area; household size from NSSO 76th Round Mumbai suburban estimates; literacy from Census 2011 M-ward; SC/ST from Census 2011

income_profile.data_source: Median from PLFS 2022-23 Mumbai suburban lower-mid income quintile; distribution near-uniform with slight left skew reflecting mid-low income mix; informal rate from NSSO 78th Round; occupations reflect RCF/BPCL refinery belt, Govandi dump area workers, and Chembur camp residential area

commute_profile.data_source: Harbour Line stations serve Chembur; MCTS 2016 mode share for M-ward TAZs; metro Line 3 from MMRDA; car ownership from Census 2011 household assets

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Moderate-high fare sensitivity reflecting mid-low income; moderate collective action from mixed residential character; institutional trust from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Mumbai sub-sample; political data from Chembur Assembly constituency 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Moderate clustering from mix of old Chembur Camp colonies and newer developments; cross-income bridging from RCF township (formal sector) adjacent to Govandi (informal slum); residential colony dominant

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Vendors around Chembur station; footfall from Harbour Line Chembur station boarding data
Chembur Camp area retail market; MCGM trade license data for M-ward
Deonar dumping ground area — waste sorting and recycling informal economy; employment estimates from MCGM solid waste management data and Chintan Environmental Research
Informal services near RCF/BPCL factory gates — tea stalls, food vendors, auto stands; estimated from refinery shift worker patterns
Tilak Nagar residential area market; MCGM market survey data

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Middle Income Residential template from AGENT_SPEC.md adjusted for lower end: daily_wage_worker raised to 0.14 reflecting Govandi informal workforce; migrant_worker added at 0.04 for Deonar waste workers; formal_sector reduced to 0.29; sum = 1.00

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 counts from MCGM corporator data for M-ward, RCF/BPCL management representing formal industrial sector, community organisation records
